'''Regga''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracer]] who competed in a race on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Fate" /> around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> Racing through [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]], he stayed too high and brushed the cliffs, [[Death/Legends|dying]] instantly.<ref name="Novel">[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]]</ref> After his [[Death/Legends|death]], [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|pit droids]] searched for the parts from his [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]]<ref name="Fate" /> for a [[Standard month/Legends|month]].<ref name="Novel" /> Prior to the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] shopkeeper [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] commanded [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to visit the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] at [[Mochot Steep/Legends|Mochat Steep]] to acquire parts from Regga's podracer, specifically the thrusters. Skywalker repaired the Jawas' [[Moisture vaporator|vaporator]] for their [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] and left with the parts, which he added to his own [[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|podracer]].<ref name="Fate" />

==Behind the scenes==
Regga was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|novelization]] of the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The novel was written by [[Terry Brooks]].<ref name="Novel" />

In the 1999 [[Jedi Readers]] book ''[[Anakin's Fate]]'', Regga is stated to have survived a crash with [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]]. He left Tatooine after the race and vowed to never race against the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]]. For the purposes of this article, this is assumed to be an inconsistency, as this is the only source to record the events differently.<ref name="Fate" /> In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Regga is stated to have died during the crash.<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
